seoTitle: Cowirra vs Crafers — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cowirra and Crafers. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cowirra and Crafers.
heading: Cowirra vs Crafers — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cowirra, South Australia and Crafers, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crafers has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Cowirra (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cowirra or Crafers safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cowirra has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Crafers scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cowirra scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Crafers scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cowirra or Crafers?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crafers has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
